name: distortionz_assassin
changelog: v1.1.4 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.1.3 — Reverted ground-snap helper. v1.1.2 introduced SnapPedToGround which used GetGroundZFor_3dCoord to fix floating peds, but it overcorrected — peds now sank into sidewalks/raised surfaces because the probe was finding ground at a Z below the actual standing surface. Sir's directive: don't modify configured Z values, just spawn at coords.z exactly. Reverted: removed the helper definition and all 4 call sites (SpawnStandingTarget, SpawnWalkingTarget, SpawnBuildingTarget, boss ped). Peds now spawn at the configured Z with no extra modification. v1.1.2 — (broken) ground snap. v1.1.1 — Previous release.
